12 VCODE2 VCODE2 MDS Data Specs Version Code CHAR 5 This field indicates which version of the MDS layout is being submitted for this assessment.
13 MDSBSQNO MDS_SUBM_SEQ_NBR MDS Submission Sequence Number CHAR 10 Unique identifier of the submission file that contains this assessment when combined with state identifier.
14 VCODE1 VCODE1 MDS Version Completed Code CHAR 5 This field indicates which version of the MDS RAI form was completed for this assessment.
